---
title: "STAT5003 Assignment Title"
author: "Your group number"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide 
---

# Introduction

This template is provided as a guide, and you are welcome to modify it as needed.

# Framing & Dataset Selection

## Subsection (for example)


```{r}
# R code....

```

# Consider & Gather Data


```{r} 
# R code...
```

# Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)

Useful numerical and graphical outputs should be shown in the report. 


```{r} 
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = wt, y = mpg)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = cyl)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ x) +
  labs(title = "MPG vs. Weight",
       x = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
       y = "Miles per Gallon")
```

# Project Planning



# References

List all the references used throughout the report using APA7 Style.

# AI Use Statment
If applicable,

I acknowledge the use of [AI tool + version, publisher and URL] to generate [summary of what was generated].
